simple_types.name: addr7
simple_types.code:
type addr7 is mod 2**7
  with size => 7;

documentation.description:
Unchecked conversions to convert unsigned into signed values.  Others
may be added as needed.

simple_types.name: buff_index
simple_types.code: type buff_index is new Integer range 0 .. 127;

simple_types.name: int12
simple_types.code:
type int12 is range -(2**11) .. 2**11 - 1
  with size => 12;

documentation.description:
Unchecked conversions to convert unsigned into signed values.  Others
may be added as needed.

simple_types.name: uint12
simple_types.code:
type uint12 is mod 2**12
  with size => 12;

Unchecked conversions to convert unsigned into signed values.  Others
may be added as needed.

array_types.name: buffer
array_types.code: type buffer is array(buff_index'Range) of uint8;

access_types.name: buff_ptr
access_types.code: type buff_ptr is access all buffer;

documentation.description:
Buffer to use for reading and writing from I2C or SPI bus.  In most
  cases, only a few bytes are needed.  This should be quite adequate.

Buffer to use for reading and writing from I2C or SPI bus.  In most
  cases, only a few bytes are needed.  This should be quite adequate.

generic_instantiations.name: uint12_to_int12
generic_instantiations.code:
function uint12_to_int12 is
  new Ada.Unchecked_Conversion(source => uint12, target => int12);

documentation.description: Get the high and low bytes (uint8) of a 16 bit uint
